title: Cherry Blossom Meeting and a Coming Blizzard
overview: On the way to her first job, the stoic Fuyutsuki-san has a strange encounter with Himuro-kun, a descendent of a snow woman.

title: The Okinawan Sea and Melting Feelings
overview: A business trip to Okinawa has Fuyutsuki-san doing her best to reassure Himuro-kun, who is fearful of what might happen under the blazing southern sun.

title: A First Meal and a Secret Photo
overview: Himuro-kun wants to take Fuyutsuki-san to dinner as thanks for her kindness, but first he must choose a restaurant...

title: A Day-Off Date and a Shared Game
overview: Fuyutsuki-san invites Himuro-kun to a movie, and their overtime together takes a turn...

title: The Fox Girl and the Phoenix Boy
overview: Saejima expresses affection for Komori, while Katori stumbles in pursuing his own interests.

title: Lost in Amusement Park
overview: A considerate gift from the section chief leads to a double date at an amusement park.

title: Excitement! The Halloween Costume Contest
overview: The boss is hosting a costume contest at work, and there's a big cash prize for the winner!

title: The Little Sister Appears! Christmas on the Slopes
overview: A trip to a ski resort leads to Fuyutsuki and Himuro getting closer, as a new person from Himuro's life appears.

title: Lost Again in First Shrine Visit
overview: The gang gets together (online) for New Year's Eve, then makes an outing out of their first shrine visit.

title: Sleepover in the Storm!!
overview: When a storm stops the trains from running, the boys decide to spend the night at Katori's, while the girls get a room at a business hotel.

title: Catch Me & Touch Me
overview: Himuro-kun makes his move in pursuing a cohabitation he's always longed for...

title: Their Night Together and the Morning Spring Came
overview: A long-awaited business trip between Himuro and Fuyutsuki is sent awry by sudden illness.
